items.title: Home Depot (HD) Stock Declines While Market Improves: Some Information for Investors
items.description: Home Depot (HD) reached $383.04 at the closing of the latest trading day, reflecting a -2.05% change compared to its last close.

items.title: Forget AI—Tax Refunds Could Give Retail Stocks a Lift
items.description: Artificial-intelligence anxiety has driven sharp moves in retail stocks, but rising tax refunds could provide a more durable tailwind for select companies this spring.

items.title: Best Consumer Stock to Buy Right Now: Costco or Home Depot?
items.description: Both companies dominate within their respective retailing segments.

items.title: HD Jumps 17% in 3 Months: Should You Buy, Hold or Sell the Stock?
items.description: Home Depot stock climbs 17% in three months, but premium valuation, estimate cuts and housing headwinds complicate its near-term outlook.

items.title: Home Depot's Capital Discipline Drives Long-Term Shareholder Value
items.description: HD reinforces long-term growth with disciplined capital allocation, balancing $900M in Q3 investments with steady dividends and strong cash flow.
